name_en: Nuclear Science and Technology Research Institute
description: The Nuclear Science and Technology Research Institute (NSTRI) is the principal research arm of the [Atomic Energy Organisation of Iran](/orgs/atomic-energy-organisation-of-iran), responsible for applied nuclear research, isotope production, and development of reactor and radiation technologies. [Amir Hossein Faghihi](/people/amir-hossein-faghihi), a former AEOI vice president, served as its head before being killed in Israeli airstrikes on 13 June 2025.

sources.title: Nuclear Science and Technology Research Institute

editorial_notes: Subsidiary of AEOI. Also referred to as NSTRI. Amir Hossein Faghihi was head at time of death.
